user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected. Account: Azure Ridge Partners.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Thomas Okafor <thomas.okafor@azureridgepa.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-09 10:59 EST
Subject: Follow-up: deployment blockers Review

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with deployment blockers. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Thomas Okafor <thomas.okafor@azureridgepa.com>
Date: 2024-02-19 10:35 EST
Subject: Follow-up: deployment blockers Review

Our team encountered some challenges with deployment blockers. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Thomas Okafor <thomas.okafor@azureridgepa.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-13 08:58 EST
Subject: URGENT: deployment blockers Issue at Azure Ridge Partners

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about deployment blockers. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: deployment blockers Discussion - Azure Ridge Partners
Date: 2024-02-18
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners), Raj Mehta (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is deployment blockers.

[00:08:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on vendor dependencies and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:11:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is data residency.

[00:16:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around data residency.

[00:18:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on budget approval and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:23:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around performance requirements.

[00:27:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around budget approval.

[00:30:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about cost optimization. Can we address those?

[00:32:00] Thomas Okafor (Azure Ridge Partners): Let me add some context -- we've been working on resource allocation and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:35:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about data residency. Can we address those?

[00:38:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around resource allocation.
